title: Wawa - Abington/Jenkintown, PA - PH&C
excerpt: Key Features: 4,691sf Food Market with 12 fuel stations 3,500sf Bank with 3 Drive-Thru lanes with Canopy Soil Nail & Shot-crete Stone Look Retaining Wall Infividual NPDES Permit PennDOT & Township Access & Signal Improvements SEPTA Station Improvements
